info.name: Adobe Commerce Optimizer – Automotive Categories API
info.description:
Postman collection for creating and managing automotive parts & accessories categories via the Adobe Commerce Optimizer Data Ingestion REST API.

## Catalog structure
This collection models a two-family automotive catalog:
- `parts-catalog` — OEM and aftermarket parts (engine, brakes, suspension, electrical)
- `seasonal-catalog` — Seasonal promotions (winter prep, summer performance)

## Setup
Set the following Collection Variables before running any request:
- `tenantId` – from Commerce Cloud Manager → Instance Details
- `clientId` – from Adobe Developer Console
- `clientSecret` – from Adobe Developer Console
- `region` – e.g. `na1`
- `environment` – `sandbox` for non-production, leave empty for production

Run **"0. Get Access Token"** first. The token is saved automatically to `accessToken` via a test script.

exec: console.error('Failed to get access token:', JSON.stringify(json));

request.description: Generates an IMS access token using client credentials. The token is automatically saved to the `accessToken` collection variable via the Test script.
Creates the root-level 'Engine & Drivetrain' category. parentSlug must be an empty string for level 1 root categories.
Creates a level 2 child under 'Engine & Drivetrain'. The parentSlug must reference the exact slug of the parent category.
Creates a level 3 leaf category for Pistons & Rings. Images are omitted — leaf nodes feeding product listing pages often do not need a hero image.
Batch creates two root categories (Brakes and Suspension & Steering) plus five child categories in a single request. Successful response: {"status": "ACCEPTED", "acceptedCount": 7}

item.name: 5. Create Full Rich Category – Electrical & Lighting

request.description: Creates the Electrical & Lighting root with full SEO metadata and dual images (hero + thumbnail with customRoles), plus three child categories in one request.

item.name: 6. Create Seasonal Family – Winter & Summer Campaigns

request.description: Creates two seasonal root categories with children under the separate seasonal-catalog family. Seasonal categories are independent from the parts-catalog hierarchy and queryable via family argument.

Assigns the ProStart AGM Battery to two categories across different families: parts-catalog (Batteries & Charging) and seasonal-catalog (Cold Weather Batteries). A single SKU can belong to categories across multiple families simultaneously.
